element.hint: Color representing the maximum data value
element.label: Color Scale Max
element.name: color_scale_max

element.hint: Margin around the color legend in pixels
element.label: Color Legend - Margin (px)
element.name: color_legend_margin

element.hint: Fill color for regions with no data
element.label: Default Fill Color
element.name: default_color

element.hint: URL or path to the GeoJSON file defining map regions
element.label: GeoJSON Source
element.name: geo_json_source

element.hint: Display region name labels on the map
element.label: Show Region Labels
element.name: show_labels

element.hint: Color representing the minimum data value
element.label: Color Scale Min
element.name: color_scale_min

element.hint: Color of the region labels on the map
element.label: Labels - Color
element.name: label_color

element.hint: Allow users to zoom and pan the map
element.label: Enable Zoom/Pan
element.name: zoomable

element.hint: Geographic map projection used to render the choropleth
element.label: Map - Projection
element.name: map_projection
